escalation.rationale: Ongoing strikes in Ukraine with 7 killed, drone incidents destabilizing Latvia government, and ship seizures near Iran heighten tensions.

ticker_items: Russia strikes kill 7, injure dozens in Ukraine capital
Latvia PM resigns after Ukrainian drone incidents
Ship seized off UAE heading toward Iranian waters
Israel escalates Gaza attacks despite Iran ceasefire
EU faces doubts on €90bn Ukraine military aid package

eastern_europe.description: Mass drone and missile attack hitting over 20 locations including schools and residential buildings.
Russian strikes across Ukraine leave 7 dead and dozens injured in capital.

middle_east.description: Intensified airstrikes killing 22 people including 8 children ahead of ceasefire deadline.
Israel escalated attacks in Gaza following halt of Iran bombing campaign.

claimed_totals.figure: 3,468 dead in Iran, 2,702 dead in Lebanon, 28 in Gulf states

middle_east.text: Progress is being made in talks with Iran
middle_east.speaker: VP Vance
middle_east.title: US Vice President

observers.description: President Trump visits China for summit with Xi Jinping discussing Iran conflict. US pressuring China not to arm Iran while Trump seeks Chinese cooperation to end the war.
Reports indicate UAE joined US and Israel in military strikes on Iran, including attack on Lavan Island refinery in April. UAE has not publicly acknowledged participation in operations.
Pakistan serving as key US-Iran mediator but talks have stalled. Doubts in Washington may open door for other mediators like Oman, Turkey, or Egypt to take lead role.

Prime Minister Evika Silina resigned after coalition partner withdrew support over Ukrainian drone incidents. The resignation highlights growing tensions over Ukraine support among NATO allies as drone incidents affect domestic politics.
Zimbabwean nationals reportedly lured into fighting for Russia in Ukraine. Families are calling on governments in Moscow and Harare to secure return of their loved ones from Ukrainian front lines.

financial.notes: Western countries have frozen approximately $590 billion belonging to sanctioned nations including Russia and Iran.

update_log.text: Ship reported seized off UAE coast heading toward Iranian territorial waters
Latvia Prime Minister resigns over Ukrainian drone incidents affecting coalition
Russia strikes across Ukraine kill 7 and injure dozens in Kyiv
41 OSCE countries invoke Moscow Mechanism over Ukrainian children indoctrination
Israel-Lebanon ceasefire talks begin in Washington as current agreement nears expiration
Russian mass drone and missile attack on Kyiv kills 1 and wounds 31 civilians
VP Vance reports progress in Iran war talks as Trump begins China summit
